hooks.command: bash -c 'C="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; H="$C/.claude/hooks/session-init.cjs"; if [ ! -e "$H" ]; then G=$(git -C "$C" rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$G" ]; then M=$(dirname "$G"); if [ -d "$M/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$M" != "$C" ]; then mkdir -p "$C/.claude"; ln -sfn "$M/.claude/hooks" "$C/.claude/hooks"; fi; fi; fi; [ -e "$H" ] && exec node "$H"'

bash -c 'C="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; H="$C/.claude/hooks/dev-rules-reminder.cjs"; if [ ! -e "$H" ]; then G=$(git -C "$C" rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$G" ]; then M=$(dirname "$G"); if [ -d "$M/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$M" != "$C" ]; then mkdir -p "$C/.claude"; ln -sfn "$M/.claude/hooks" "$C/.claude/hooks"; fi; fi; fi; [ -e "$H" ] && exec node "$H"'

bash -c 'C="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; H="$C/.claude/hooks/session-end.cjs"; if [ ! -e "$H" ]; then G=$(git -C "$C" rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$G" ]; then M=$(dirname "$G"); if [ -d "$M/.claude/hooks" ] && [ "$M" != "$C" ]; then mkdir -p "$C/.claude"; ln -sfn "$M/.claude/hooks" "$C/.claude/hooks"; fi; fi; fi; [ -e "$H" ] && exec node "$H"'
